timeline.body: {"error":{"code":429,"message":"You exceeded your current quota, please check your plan and billing details. For more information on this error, head to: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/rate-limits.","status":"RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED"}}

provenance.notes: Verbatim response body from an unresolved report of RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED despite reported use within free-tier limits; provider and model request matching are replay harness metadata.
